title: Lilith's ReCobbled ReCreation
description: A custom Queer, Cobblemon & Create modpack for the Daemon's SMP server. DM @lilithdaemon on discord to join!
body:
Explore a reimagined Kanto with custom gyms, each with their own unique challenges!
Roleplay as a Type Specialist, with 54 shiny starter options, 3 for each type!
Embark upon an epic journey to uncover lost ruins and summon your favorite legendary pokemon!
Participate in competitive battling with full support for Z-Moves, Tera-types, gigantmax, and megas! (Including new Megas from Legends ZA)
Enjoy the comfort and safe-haven of a mature queer community. 
Be who you want to be: Between Ears, Gender Mod, Cosmetic Armours, and more, you have complete freedom to express yourself. 
Hunt and capture our custom queer shiny pokemon, with new shinies being added every week!
No P2W, lootboxes, paid ranks, etc. We are here to have fun, not make money!


Apply on our discord to be added to the whitelist
Discord: https://discord.gg/BDNh85yPwR
